# CONSTRUCT query, N-Triples response.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: status-only
description: CONSTRUCT returns N-Triples 200 + content-type

=== request
GET /sparql?query=CONSTRUCT%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: application/n-triples

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/n-triples
